300.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Urfuta bin 'Adi b. Umayya b. Jidara b. 'Auf b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj
300.arabic: عبد الله بن عرفطة بن عدي بن أمية
300.bio: According to some sources He was an Ally of  B.al-Harith B.al-Khazraj. There is some confusion over him, 'Abdullah bin 'Abs and 'Abdullah bin 'Umair.

301.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
301.arabic: عبد الله بن عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول
301.mother_name: Khawla bint al-Mundhir of Mailk b. al-Najjar
301.bio: His Father was the infamous Hypocrite. His old name was Habab which was changed to 'Abdullah by Prophet(ﷺ).

302.full_name: Mulayka bint 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
302.arabic: مليكة بنت عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول
302.mother_name: Umm Khalid bint 'Amir of B. Sa'ida
302.bio: Her Father was the infamous Hypocrite.

303.full_name: Ramla bint 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
303.arabic: رملة بنت عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول
303.mother_name: Lubna bint 'Ubada b. Nadla of B.Qauqal
303.bio: Her Father was the infamous Hypocrite.

304.full_name: Umm Sa'd bint 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
304.arabic: أم سعد بنت عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول
304.mother_name: Lubna bint 'Ubada b. Nadla of B.Qauqal
304.bio: Her Father was the infamous Hypocrite.
304.spouses: Jubayr bin Thabit bin Dahhak of B.al-Hubla

305.full_name: 'Ubada bin 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
305.arabic: عبادة بن عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول الخزرجي
305.bio: His Father was the infamous Hypocrite.

306.full_name: Muhammad bin 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
306.arabic: محمد بن عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول الخزرجي
306.bio: His Father was the infamous Hypocrite.

307.full_name: Ma'mar bin 'Abdullah ibn Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
307.arabic: معمر بن عبد الله بن أبي بن سلول الخزرجي
307.bio: His Father was the infamous Hypocrite.

308.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Abs, An Ally of B.al-Harith B.al-Khazraj
308.bio: There is some confusion over him, 'Abdullah bin 'Urfuta and 'Abdullah bin 'Umair.

309.short_name: Umm Malik bint Ubayy bin Malik
309.full_name: Umm Malik bint Ubayy (b. Salul) b. Malik b. Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm
309.arabic: أم مالك بنت أبي بن مالك الأنصارية
309.bio: Her brother was the infamous Hypocrite.

310.full_name: Zayd bin Wadi'a b. 'Amr b. Qays b. b. Jazi b. 'Adi b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf b.al-Khazraj
310.arabic: زيد بن وديعة بن عمرو بن قيس
310.mother_name: Umm Zayd bint al-Harith of B.al-Hubla

311.full_name: Zaynab bint Sahl bin al-Sa'b b. Qays b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf b.al-Khazraj
311.arabic: زينب بنت سهل بن الصعب بن قيس

312.full_name: Rifa'a bin 'Amr bin Zayd b. 'Amr b. b. Tha'laba b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf b.al-Khazraj
312.arabic: رفاعة بن عمرو بن زيد بن عمرو
312.father_name: 'Amr bin Zayd b. 'Amr b. b. Tha'laba
312.mother_name: Umm Rifa'a bint Qays nin Malik al-Hubla

313.full_name: Ma'bad bin 'Abbad b. Qushayr b. al-Muqaddam b.Salm b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf b.al-Khazraj
313.arabic: أبو حميضة/معبد بن عباد بن قشير بن العدم
313.father_name: 'Amr bin Zayd b. 'Amr b. b. Tha'laba

314.full_name: Mu'adha bint 'Abdullah b. 'Amr b. Bazeen(Murra) b. Qays b. 'Adi b. Umayya b. Jidara b. 'Auf
314.arabic: معاذة بنت عبد الله بن عمرو

315.full_name: Aws bin Khawli b. 'Abdullah b. al-Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf b.al-Khazraj
315.arabic: أوس بن خولى بن عبد الله بن الحارث
315.mother_name: Jamila bint Ubayy bin Malik of B.al-Hubla
315.bio: Brotherhood was made b/w him and Shuja bin Wahb Asadi. He participated in the washing/preparing  of Prophet(ﷺ) body for burial.

316.full_name: Khawla bint Khawli b. 'Abdullah b. al-Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf
316.arabic: خولة بنت خولى بن عبد الله الأنصارية
316.mother_name: Jamila bint Ubayy bin Malik of B.al-Hubla

317.full_name: Fushum bint Aws bin Khawli b. 'Abdullah b. al-Harith b. 'Ubaid b. Malik  b. Salm b. Ghanm b. 'Auf

318.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Rabi' b. Qays b. 'Amir b. 'Abbad b. al-abjar(Khudra) b. 'Auf b. al-Harith b. al-Harith
318.arabic: عبد الله بن الربيع بن قيس بن عمرو
318.mother_name: Fatima bint 'Amr b. 'Atiya of B. Mazin

319.full_name: Na'ila bint Rabi' b. Qays b. 'Amir b. 'Abbad b. al-abjar(Khudra) b. 'Auf b. al-Harith b. al-Harith
319.arabic: نائلة بنت الربيع بن قيس بن عامر
319.mother_name: Fatima bint 'Amr b. 'Atiya of B. Mazin

320.full_name: Thabit bin Zayd b. Qays b. Zayd  b. al-Nu'man b. Malik(al-Aghar) b. Tha'laba b. Ka'b b. al-Khazraj
320.bio: According to his great grandson, He was one of the six Companion who collected the Qur'an. There is some confusion with another companion who also collected Qu'ran, Qays bin Al-Sakan bin Qays, and whose kunya was also Abu Zayd.

321.full_name: Rafi' bin Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik
321.bio:
A member of Khazraj tribe of Madinah. Met with the prophet (ﷺ)in the elevent year of his mission, 620 CE. Among the six people from Yathrib to make the pledge to accept and spread Islam and to return the following year with new converts. Was appointed as one of the nine chiefs of the Khazraj tribe in the Second Pledge of Aqaba. According to some sources, He was present at Badr.
Full Lineage: Rafi' bin Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj

322.full_name: Malik b. Rafi' b. Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. Abdu Haritha
322.arabic: مالك بن رافع بن مالك بن العجلان
322.bio: Full Lineage: Malik b. Rafi' bin Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj

323.short_name: Rifa'a bin Rafi' bin Malik bin al-'Ajlan
323.full_name: Rifa'a b. Rafi' b. Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha
323.arabic: رفاعة بن رافع بن مالك بن العجلان
323.bio: Full Lineage: Rifa'a b. Rafi' bin Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj
323.spouses: Umm 'Abdur Rahman,Umm Walad,Salma bint Mu'adh,bint al-Fakah

324.full_name: Khallad b. Rafi' b. Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. Abdu Haritha
324.arabic: خلاد بن رافع بن مالك بن العجلان
324.bio: Full Lineage: Khallad b. Rafi' bin Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj

325.short_name: Yahya bin Khallad bin Rafi' bin Malik
325.full_name: Yahya bin Khallad b. Rafi' b. Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq
325.arabic: يحيى بن خلاد بن رافع بن مالك
325.bio: Full Lineage: Yahya bin Khallad b. Rafi' bin Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Abdu Haritha b. Malik b. Ghadb b. Jushum b. al-Khazraj

326.full_name: Umm Rafi' bint 'Uthman ibn Khalida b. Mukhallad b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq

327.full_name: Umama bint 'Uthman ibn Khalida b. Mukhallad b. 'Amir b. Zurayq b. 'Amir b. Zurayq
327.arabic: أمامة بنت عثمان بن خالدة الأنصارية الزرق

328.full_name: Al Aswad bin Nawfal bin Khuwailid bin Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Quasy bin Kilab b. Murrah

329.full_name: 'Amir ibn ('Amr bin) al-Akwa'(Sinan) b. 'Abdullah b. Qashieer b. Khuziama b. Malik b. Sinan b. Aslam
329.bio:
Some said that he was nephew of Salma bin al-Akwa.
He was killed at Khybar during a duel with a Jewish man when his sword reflected at him when he strikes the jew. Both were killed.

330.full_name: Thabit bin Khalid bin al-Nu'man b. Khansa' b. 'Usayra b. 'Abd 'Auf b. Ghanm b. Malik b. Al-Najjar
330.bio: According to some other sources, he was martyred in the battle of Yamama (12 AH)
330.spouses: Adam bint 'Amr bin Ma'uwiyya of B.Murra

331.full_name: 'Umara bin Hazm ibn Zayd b. Ludhan b. 'Amr b. 'Abd 'Auf b. Ghanm b. Malik b. Al-Najjar
331.mother_name: Khalida bint Anas of B. Sa'ida
331.bio: The brotherhood was made b/w him and Muhriz bin Nadla al-Asadi(811)

332.full_name: Suraqa bin Ka'b bin 'Amr b. 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Ghaziya b. 'Amr b. 'Abd 'Auf b. Ghanm b. Malik
332.bio: According to some other sources, he was martyred in the battle of Yamama (12 AH)

333.full_name: Haritha bin al-Nu'man bin Nafi' b. Zayd b. 'Ubayd b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar
333.spouses: 1274,A woman from B.'Abdullah b.Ghatafan,A woman from B.Junda'

334.full_name: Sulaym bin Qays bin Qahd b. Qays b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar

335.full_name: Suhayl bin Rafi' b. 'Abd 'Amr b. 'A'idh b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar
335.arabic: سهيل بن رافع بن أبي عمرو
335.bio: He and his brother owned the land where the Prophetic Mosque was built.

336.full_name: Mas'ud bin Aws bin Zayd b. Asram b. Zayd b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar
336.bio: There is some confusion between this companion and another one from B.Salima.
336.spouses: Habiba bint Aslam bin Haris of B.Haritha

337.short_name: Abu Khuzayma bin Aws bin Zayd
337.full_name: Abu Khuzayma bin Aws bin Zayd b. Asram b. Zayd b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar
337.arabic: أبو خزيمة بن أوس بن زيد

338.full_name: Rafi' bin al-Harith bin Sawad b. Zayd b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar

339.full_name: Sahl bin Rafi' b. 'Abd 'Amr b. 'A'idh b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar
339.arabic: سهل بن رافع بن أبي عمرو
339.bio: He and his brother owned the land where the Prophetic Mosque was built.

340.full_name: al-Nu'man/Nu'ayman bin 'Amr bin Rifa'a b. al-Harith b. Sawad b. Malik b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar

341.full_name: 'Amir bin Mukhallad b. al-Harith b. Sawad b. Malik b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar

342.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Qays (b. Khalid) b. Khalada b. al-Harith b. Sawad b. Malik b. Ghanm b. Malik
342.arabic: عبد الله بن قيس بن خلدة
342.bio: His martyrdom at Uhud is not agreed upon, and it is said that he died during 'Uthman Khilafat.
342.spouses: Su'ad bin Qays bin Mukhallad of B.Malik B.al-Najjar,Unknown

343.full_name: Thabit bin 'Amr bin Zayd b. 'Ady b. Sawad b. Malik b. Ghanm b. Malik b. al-Najjar
343.bio: His participation at Badr is not agreed upon.

344.full_name: Rabi'a bin 'Amr (b. Yasar) bin Jurad b. Yarbu' al-Juhayni

345.full_name: 'Adi bin al-Zaghba'(Sinan) bin Babi' b. Tha'laba b. Zuhra b. Badeel b. Sa'd ..b. Ghatafan al-Juhayni

346.full_name: Wadi'a/Rifa' bin 'Amr (b. Yasar) bin Jurad b. Yarbu' al-Juhayni

348.full_name: Abu al-Hamra, a freedman/Mawla of al-Harith bin Rifa'a
348.arabic: أبو الحمراء مولى الحارث بن رفاعة

349.full_name: Ubbay bin Mua'dh bin Anas b. Qays b. 'Ubaid b. Zaid b. Mu'awiya b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Najjar

350.full_name: Anas bin Mua'dh bin Anas b. Qays b. 'Ubaid b. Zaid b. Mu'awiya b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Najjar
350.bio: According to some, He died later during the 'Uthman Khilafat.

351.full_name: Aus bin Thabit b. al-Mundhir b. Haram b. 'Amr b. Zayd Manat b. 'Adi b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Najjar
351.bio: According to some sources, he was martyred at Uhud. The brotherhood was b/w him and 'Uthman bin 'Affan

352.full_name: Ubayy bin Thabit b. al-Mandhur b. Haram b. 'Amr b. Zayd Manat b. 'Adi b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Najjar

353.full_name: 'Asma bin al-Husain bin Wabara bin Khalid b. al-'Ajlan b. Zayd b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
353.bio: His participation at Badr is not agreed upon.

354.full_name: Bujayr bin Abi Bujayr, an ally b. Dinar b. al-Najjar from Bali or Juhayna or Ghatafan
354.students: إسماعيل بن أمية روى له أبو داود حديثا

355.full_name: Tha'laba bin 'Amr bin Mihsan b. 'Amr b. 'Atik b. 'Amr b. Mabdhul ('Amir) b. Malik b. al-Najjar
355.bio: According to some sources, He died during 'Uthman Khilafat.

356.full_name: al-Harith bin al-Samma bin 'Amr b. 'Atik b. 'Amr b. Mabdhul ('Amir) b. Malik b. al-Najjar
356.bio: He went back from Badr before battle but he received the spoils of the war. He protected Prophet(ﷺ) during the battle of Uhud.

357.full_name: Sahl bin 'Atik b. al-Nu'man b. 'Amr b. 'Atik b. 'Amr b. Mabdhul ('Amir) b. Malik b. al-Najjar

358.full_name: al-Harith bin 'Atik b. al-Nu'man b. 'Amr b. 'Atik b. 'Amr b. Mabdhul ('Amir) b. Malik b. al-Najjar
358.arabic: أبو أخزم , الحارث بن عتيك بن النعمان

359.full_name: Basheer bin 'Amr bin Mihsan b. 'Amr b. 'Atik b. 'Amr b. Mabdhul ('Amir) b. Malik b. al-Najjar
359.bio: According to some sources, he is Tha'laba bin 'Amr bin Mihsan. but he was Abu 'Amra brothers.

360.full_name: Haritha bin Suraqa bin al-Harith b. 'Ady b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
360.arabic: حارثة بن سراقة بن الحارث الأنصاري
360.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and al-Saib bin bin 'Uthman bin Muz'uan.

361.full_name: 'Amr bin Tha'laba bin Wahb b. 'Ady b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
361.arabic: عمرو بن ثعلبة بن وهب الأنصاري

362.full_name: Muhriz bin 'Amir bin Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
362.mother_name: Sa'di bint Kuthayma of B.al-Salm of Aus
362.bio: He died just before the battle of Uhud and therefore considered as the participant of Uhud.

363.full_name: Salit bin Qays bin 'Amr bin 'Ubaid b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
363.spouses: Sakhila bint al-Samma of B.Malik B.al-Najjar

364.full_name: Usayra bin 'Amr(Abi Kharija) bin Qays b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
364.bio: There are some other versions of his first name.

365.full_name: 'Amir bin Umayya bin Zayd b. al-Hashas b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar

366.full_name: Thabit bin Khansa'/Hassan b.'Amr b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar

367.full_name: Qays bin al-Sakan bin Qays b. Za'ura' b. Haram b. Jundab b. Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
367.bio: He is one of the companion who gathered Qu'ran during Prophet's(ﷺ) life. There are some confusion over the name of this person (Abu Zayd is also Kunya for some other companion)
367.spouses: Umm Khawla bint Sufyan bin Qays

368.full_name: (Ka'b bin) al-Harith b. Zalim b. 'Abs b. Haram b. Jundab b. Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
368.arabic: أبو الأعور , كعب بن الحارث بن ظالم
368.mother_name: Umm Niyar bint Iyyas of Bali

369.full_name: Sawad bin Ghaziya bin Wahb/Uhaib,an Ally of B.'Ady b.al-Najjar from Bali b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'
369.bio: The Prophet(ﷺ) poked him with a stick. He asked for revenge. Prophet(ﷺ) open his belly so that he can poke Prophet(ﷺ). But he instead kissed it.

370.full_name: 'Umayr bin 'Amir bin Malik b. Khanasa b. Mabdhul b. 'Amr b. Ghanm b. Mazin b. al-Najjar
370.mother_name: Nai'la bint Abi 'Asim of B.Mazin B.al-Najjar
370.spouses: Na'ila bint Surqa bin Ka'b of B.Malik B.al-Najjar,A woman from Kalb

371.full_name: Qays bin Mukhallad b. Tha'laba b. Sakhr b. Habib b. al-Harith b. Tha'laba b. Mazin b. al-Najjar
371.arabic: قيس بن مخلد بن ثعلبة بن صخر
371.mother_name: Ghaytla bint Malik of B.Ady B.al-Najjar
371.spouses: Rughayba bint Aws of B.Mazin B.al-Najjar

372.full_name: 'Usayma, an ally b. Mazin b. al-Najjar from B.Asad b. Khuzayma
372.arabic: عصيمة حليف من بني أسد بن خزيمة

373.full_name: Kaysan, an client of  B.Mazin b. al-Najjar
373.arabic: كيسان مولى بني مازن بن النجار

374.full_name: al-Nu'man bin 'Abdu 'Amr bin Mas'ud b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar
374.arabic: النعمان بن عبد عمرو بن مسعود

375.full_name: al-Dahhak bin 'Abdu 'Amr bin Mas'ud b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar
375.arabic: الضحاك بن عبد عمرو بن مسعود

376.full_name: Jabir bin Khalid bin Mas'ud b.'Abdul Ashhal b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar

377.short_name: Ka'b bin Zayd bin Qays bin Malik
377.full_name: Ka'b bin Zayd bin Qays bin Malik bin Ka'b b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar

378.full_name: Sulaym bin al-Harith bin Tha'laba bin Ka'b b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar
378.spouses: Suhayma bint Hilalbin Waram of B.Slaim b. Mansur

379.full_name: Sa'id/Sa'd bin Suhayl  bin Malik bin Ka'b b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar
379.arabic: سعيد بن سهيل بن مالك بن كعب

380.full_name: 'Amr bin Qays bin Malik bin Ka'b b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar
380.arabic: عمرو بن قيس بن مالك بن كعب

381.full_name: Qubta bin 'Abdu 'Amr bin Mas'ud b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Haritha b. Dinar b. al-Najjar
381.arabic: قطبة بن عبد عمرو بن مسعود

382.full_name: Tamim bin Aus b. Kharija b. Suwad b. Juzayma b. Dhara' b. 'Ady b. al-Dar b. Hani b. Habib b. Namara
382.bio: Full lineage : Tamim bin Aus b. Kharija b. Suwad b. Juzayma b. Dhara'(Wada') b. 'Ady b. al-Dar b. Hani b. Habib b. Namara b. Lakhm

383.full_name: Sulaiman bin Sard b. al-Junn b. Abi al-Junn('Abdul 'Uzza) b. Manqidh b. Rabi'a b. Asram b. Dubays
383.arabic: سليمان بن صرد أبو مطرف الخزاعي
383.father_name: Sard b. al-Junn b. Abi al-Junn('Abdul 'Uzza)
383.bio: old Name:Yasar, Full lineage : Sulaiman bin Sard b. al-Junn b. Abi al-Junn('Abdul 'Uzza) b. Manqidh b. Rabi'a b. Asram b. Dubays b. Haram b. Habshia b. Ka'b b. 'Amr of Khuza'

384.full_name: Zayd bin Arqam b. Zayd b. Qays b. al-Nu'man b. Malik(al-Aghar) b. Tha'laba b. Ka'b b. al-Khazraj
384.bio: Also known as Abu Abu 'Amir, Abu Anisa, Abu Hamza Abu Sa'd

385.full_name: al-Bara' bin Malik b. al-Nadr b. DamDam b. Zayd b. Haram b. Jundub b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady

386.full_name: Anas bin al-Nadr b. DamDam b. Zayd b. Haram b. Jundub b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady
386.mother_name: Hind bint Zayd of B.Malik B.al-Najjar

387.full_name: al-Nadr bin Anas bin al-Nadr b. DamDam b. Zayd b. Haram b. Jundub b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady
387.arabic: النضر بن أنس بن النضر الأنصاري الخزرجي

388.full_name: Malik bin Qays b. Abi Qays b. Malik b. 'Ady b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. 'Ady b. al-Najjar
388.father_name: Qays b. Abi Qays b. Malik
388.bio: There are several different versions for his name: Qays bin Malik or Qays bin Sarma or Qays bin Abi Qays or Qays bin Anas

389.full_name: Shadad bin Aus bin Thabit b. al-Mandhur b. Haram b. 'Amr b. Zayd Manat b. 'Adi b. 'Amr b. Malik
389.bio: According to some sources, he was martyred at Uhud.

390.short_name: Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b
390.full_name: Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b('Amr) b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
390.arabic: كعب بن مالك بن أبى كعب
390.father_name: Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn
390.bio:
Other Names: Abu 'Abdur Rahman, Abu Muhammad One of 3 famous poets of Prophet(ﷺ). Other being Hassan bin Thabit and 'Abdullah bin Rawaha.
He was one of the three companions who were boycotted after they failed to join the expedition of Tabuk. They were forgiven by Allah after 50 days (Quran, 9:102)

391.full_name: al-Harith/al-Nu'man/'Amr bin Rab'i bin Baldama b. Khunas b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
391.father_name: Rab'i bin Baldama b. Khunas b. Sinan
391.mother_name: Kabsha bint Muthr b. Haram b. Sawad of B.Salima

392.full_name: Samra bin Junada b. Jundub b. Hujayr b. Ra'ib b. Habib b. Sawa't b. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'

393.full_name: Jabir bin Samra b. Junada b. Jundub b. Hujayr b. Ra'ib b. Habib b. Sawa't b. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'

394.full_name: Samra bin Jundub bin Hilal b. Hurayj b. Murra b. Hazn b. 'Amr b. Jabir b. Khasheen ... b. Fazara
394.bio: Also known as Abu Suliaman, Abu 'Abdura Rahman, Abu Muhammad

395.full_name: Zayd bin al-Dathinna b. Mu'awiya of B. Bayada
395.bio: He was captured during the incident of Raj'i and was taken to Makkah and sold to Quraish as slave. In Makkah, he was executed by Nastas, a client of Safwan bin Umayya, at Tanyeem with Khubayb bin 'Adi.

396.full_name: Khubayb bin 'Adi b. Malik b. 'Amir b. Majda' b. Jahjaba b. Kulfa b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik
396.bio:
Full Lineage: Khubayb bin 'Adi b. Malik b. 'Amir b. Majda' b. Jahjaba b. Kulfa b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
He was captured during the incident of Raj'i and was taken to Makkah and sold to Quraish as slave. In Makkah, he was executed at Tanyeem with Zayd bin Dathinna.

398.full_name: Mu'awiya bin Hadeej bin Jafna b. Qatira b. Haritha b. 'Abd Shams al-Kundi or al-Khulani or al-Sukoni

399.full_name: Sahl bin Sa'd (b. Sa'd) bin Malik b. Khalid b. Tha'laba b. Haritha b. 'Amr b. al-Khazraj
399.bio: He lived for about 100 years and was the last companion to die in Medina.
